subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have made mention of the Remembrance and its stations, and We extol it when it dawneth forth from the luminous Chamber on high [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا کنا ذکرنا الذکر و مراتبه و نثنی علیه اذا طلعت من الغرفه النورآء طلعه علی
subcodes.subjects: @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
